failures.description: The Executor fabricated/altered the result count and record identifier instead of answering from the ProductCatalogSearch evidence.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The tool output at index 3 returned exactly 2 matching items, with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming there are 9 options and citing record 0000000000, neither of which appears in the user request, plan, or tool result. The incorrect answer was not resolved later because the Evaluator approved it at index 5.
